name: investment-banking
description: 投行全业务AI助手，覆盖IPO招股书起草、并购重组报告书、债券募集说明书、交易所问询回复、路演推介材料和财务建模六大核心场景。自动适配科创板/创业板/主板/北交所及交易所/银行间市场的差异化监管要求，内置注册制信披格式准则和合规检查。支持永续债、绿色债券、ABS等创新品种，以及SOTP分部估值和情景分析。
descriptionEn: AI-powered investment banking assistant covering six core workflows: IPO prospectus drafting, M&A advisory reports, bond offering memoranda, regulatory response to exchange inquiries, roadshow materials, and financial modeling. Automatically adapts to board-specific disclosure requirements (STAR Market / ChiNext / Main Board / BSE) and market-specific rules (exchange / interbank). Built-in registration-based IPO disclosure format guidelines and compliance checks. Supports perpetual bonds, green bonds, ABS, and other innovative products, as well as SOTP valuation and scenario analysis.
